assertions.name: flags-async-await
assertions.description: Identifies async/await as not used in this codebase's pattern

assertions.name: flags-direct-sqlconnection
assertions.description: Flags new SqlConnection and tells the user to use GetDbConnection() instead

assertions.name: flags-missing-start-finish-logging
assertions.description: Flags the absence of _logger.Information Starting/Finished logging

assertions.name: flags-missing-try-catch
assertions.description: Flags the absence of a try/catch block with _logger.Error

assertions.name: flags-missing-connection-cleanup
assertions.description: Flags that conn.Close() should be replaced with ConnectionCleanup(conn)
